data.content: Plan attached. Implementation should remove the shared title column, extract the existing hierarchical title UI into a reusable inline block, render it as a compact single-line band beneath metadata cells in both Queues and Active, and adjust summary-row colSpan/padding so focus and hover-expansion behavior remain unchanged. Key files: `src/components/beat-columns.tsx`, `src/components/beat-column-defs.tsx`, `src/components/beat-column-helpers.tsx`, `src/components/beat-table-content.tsx`, plus table stories/tests and full quality gates.
